sections_cited: section 21 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2242 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.10845/2025. 2. For hearing of main case. 30.05.2025 Mr. Yousuf Ali, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate files his Vakalatnamas on behalf of the respondents, which is taken on record. Petition is pressed to the extent that representation filed by the petitioner, per section 21 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990, be decided expeditiously preferably within 15 days, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and vide a speaking order. He further states that no further coercive action be taken there against. Learned Assistant Attorney General is present and articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
